Thanks for filing an issue. Please read CONTRIBUTING.md first — Bob is a
personal protocol and direction-setting happens in issues, not surprise PRs.

Pick ONE of the sections below and delete the others.
-->

**What you expected**
<!-- One sentence. -->

**What actually happened**
<!-- One sentence + any error output. -->

<!-- Exact commands or steps. Include the Bob version (the header at the top of build-protocol.md) and your OS. -->

## Feature request / protocol change

**The pain you hit**
<!-- A real project moment where Bob's current behavior fell short. Be specific. -->

**What you'd want instead**
<!-- One paragraph. -->

**Why this should be in Bob and not somewhere else**
